titleSomali: Wada-xiriirka Maalinlaha ah iyo Xallinta Dhibaatooyinka
introductionSomali: Unit-kan wuxuu isku daraa adeegyada maalinlaha ah, macluumaad, xaqiijin, dhibaatooyin, xalal, cabashooyin, forms, notices, receipts, telephone/chat iyo grammar-ka A2 iyadoo xogtu dhammaanteed tahay mala-awaal.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Everyday Services.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Customer service checked the mock order and explained the available return options.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Adeegga macaamiishu wuxuu hubiyay dalabka tusaalaha ah, wuxuuna sharaxay ikhtiyaarrada soo-celinta.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: service. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Everyday Services: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Adeegyada maalinlaha ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Service vocabulary identifies the provider, place, support, and customer in a clear daily situation. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Service vocabulary identifies the provider, place, support, and customer in a clear daily situation.
grammar.sentenceStructure: service + action + customer need

positiveExamples.english: Customer service checked the mock order and explained the available return options.
positiveExamples.somali: Adeegga macaamiishu wuxuu hubiyay dalabka tusaalaha ah, wuxuuna sharaxay ikhtiyaarrada soo-celinta.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Reception” while using a fictional everyday service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Reception”, oo macnihiisu yahay “soo-dhoweyn”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Information desk” while using a fictional everyday service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Information desk” iyadoo miiska macluumaadka muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Help desk” while using a fictional everyday service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Help desk” iyadoo miiska caawimada muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: The delivery service sent a message before bringing the fictional package.
positiveExamples.somali: Adeegga gaarsiintu wuxuu diray fariin ka hor inta uusan keenin baakadka tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Repair service” while using a fictional everyday service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Repair service”, oo macnihiisu yahay “adeegga dayactirka”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Transport service” while using a fictional everyday service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Transport service”, oo macnihiisu yahay “adeegga gaadiidka”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Internet service” while using a fictional everyday service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Internet service” iyadoo adeegga internetka muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan using a fictional everyday service. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan using a fictional everyday service. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Adeegyada maalinlaha ah: waxaad baratay service + action + customer need, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Macluumaad weydiisashada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Asking for Information.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: information request • everyday problem solving • polite

vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you tell me when the next bus leaves?” iyadoo ma ii sheegi kartaa...? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

grammar.titleEnglish: Asking for Information: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Macluumaad weydiisashada
grammar.explanationSomali: A polite indirect question keeps statement word order after the question phrase: where the office is, not where is the office. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: A polite indirect question keeps statement word order after the question phrase: where the office is, not where is the office.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Could you tell me + question word + subject + verb?

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could you tell me when the next bus leaves?” while asking for service information politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you tell me when the next bus leaves?” iyadoo ma ii sheegi kartaa...? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Can you tell me where I can collect my order?” while asking for service information politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Can you tell me where I can collect my order?” iyadoo ma ii sheegi kartaa...? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Do you know whether the service is open today?” while asking for service information politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Do you know whether the service is open today?” iyadoo ma ogtahay...? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I would like to know whether evening classes are available.” iyadoo waxaan jeclaan lahaa inaan ogaado... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could you explain how to complete this section?” while asking for service information politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you explain how to complete this section?” iyadoo ma sharxi kartaa...? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Where can I find the information desk?” while asking for service information politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Where can I find the information desk?” iyadoo xaggee ka heli karaa...? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “What time does it open?” while asking for service information politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “What time does it open?” iyadoo goorma ayuu furmaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “How much does it cost?” while asking for service information politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “How much does it cost?” iyadoo immisa ayuu ku kacayaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

dialogues.titleSomali: Practice dialogue 1: asking for service information politely • communication function • Tone: neutral • comprehension • best response • role-play

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Could you tell me when the next bus leaves?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Could you tell me when the next bus leaves?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Do you know whether the service is open today?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Do you know whether the service is open today?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Could you explain how to complete this section?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Could you explain how to complete this section?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: What time does it open?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: What time does it open?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: Thank you. We have confirmed the next step.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Tallaabada xigta waan xaqiijinnay.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Hubinta iyo xaqiijinta macluumaadka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Checking and Confirming Information.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Let me check.” while confirming a fictional date, price, name, or booking, and the response matched the situation.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: checking. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Checking and Confirming Information: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Hubinta iyo xaqiijinta macluumaadka
grammar.explanationSomali: Repeat the important detail and ask for confirmation. Check dates, times, prices, quantities, names, locations, and references. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Repeat the important detail and ask for confirmation. Check dates, times, prices, quantities, names, locations, and references.
grammar.sentenceStructure: checking phrase + repeated detail + right/correct?

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Let me check.” while confirming a fictional date, price, name, or booking, and the response matched the situation.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lines.english: Let me check.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Is that correct?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Is that correct?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: So, the total is twenty dollars, right?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Could you repeat the date?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Could you repeat the date?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: Thank you. We have confirmed the next step.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Tallaabada xigta waan xaqiijinnay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan confirming a fictional date, price, name, or booking. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan confirming a fictional date, price, name, or booking. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Hubinta iyo xaqiijinta macluumaadka: waxaad baratay checking phrase + repeated detail + right/correct?, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sharaxaadda dhibaatada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Describing a Problem.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Describing a Problem: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Sharaxaadda dhibaatada
grammar.explanationSomali: State the problem clearly, identify the affected item or service, and add one useful detail. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: State the problem clearly, identify the affected item or service, and add one useful detail.
grammar.sentenceStructure: There is a problem with + noun; item/service + problem state

positiveExamples.english: There is a problem with the date on my fictional booking.
positiveExamples.somali: Dhibaato ayaa ka jirta taariikhda ballansashadayda tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “It is not working.” while describing what is wrong with a mock order or service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “It is not working.” iyadoo ma shaqaynayo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: The mock printer has stopped working, so the service desk is checking it.
positiveExamples.somali: Printer-ka tusaalaha ahi shaqada ayuu joojiyay, sidaas darteed miiska adeeggu wuu hubinayaa.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “It is damaged.” while describing what is wrong with a mock order or service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “It is damaged.” iyadoo wuu dhaawacmay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “It is missing.” while describing what is wrong with a mock order or service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “It is missing.” iyadoo wuu maqan yahay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “It is incorrect.” while describing what is wrong with a mock order or service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “It is incorrect.” iyadoo waa khaldan yahay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “It has not arrived.” while describing what is wrong with a mock order or service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “It has not arrived.” iyadoo wali ma iman muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “I received the wrong item.” while describing what is wrong with a mock order or service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I received the wrong item.” iyadoo waxaan helay alaabtii khaldanayd muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: It has stopped working.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: It has stopped working.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: It is missing.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: It is missing.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: It has not arrived.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: It has not arrived.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: Thank you. We have confirmed the next step.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Tallaabada xigta waan xaqiijinnay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan describing what is wrong with a mock order or service. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan describing what is wrong with a mock order or service. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Sharaxaadda dhibaatada: waxaad baratay There is a problem with + noun; item/service + problem state, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sharaxaadda wixii dhacay waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Explaining What Happened.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “First” while explaining a completed mock service problem, and the learner identified its practical meaning.

grammar.titleEnglish: Explaining What Happened: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Sharaxaadda wixii dhacay
grammar.explanationSomali: Use Past Simple for completed events and sequence words to make the order of events clear. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Use Past Simple for completed events and sequence words to make the order of events clear.
grammar.sentenceStructure: First + past event; then/after that + past event; finally + result

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan explaining a completed mock service problem. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan explaining a completed mock service problem. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Sharaxaadda wixii dhacay: waxaad baratay First + past event; then/after that + past event; finally + result, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.titleSomali: Present Perfect iyo dhibaato hadda saameyn leh
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Present Perfect iyo dhibaato hadda saameyn leh waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Present Perfect for Current Problems.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: current result • everyday problem solving • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “My order has not arrived.” while connecting a past event to a current problem, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “My order has not arrived.” iyadoo dalabkaygu wali ma iman muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: current result. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Present Perfect for Current Problems: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Present Perfect iyo dhibaato hadda saameyn leh
grammar.explanationSomali: Use Present Perfect when the result matters now; use Past Simple with a finished time such as yesterday. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Use Present Perfect when the result matters now; use Past Simple with a finished time such as yesterday.
grammar.sentenceStructure: subject + have/has + past participle; have/has not + past participle + yet

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “My order has not arrived.” while connecting a past event to a current problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “My order has not arrived.” iyadoo dalabkaygu wali ma iman muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “The machine has stopped working.” while connecting a past event to a current problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “The machine has stopped working.” iyadoo mashiinku shaqada ayuu joojiyay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I have lost my receipt.” iyadoo rasiidkaygii waan waayay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “She has sent the wrong document.” while connecting a past event to a current problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “She has sent the wrong document.” iyadoo waxay dirtay dukumentigii khaldan muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “The appointment has been cancelled.” iyadoo ballanta waa la baajiyay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan connecting a past event to a current problem. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan connecting a past event to a current problem. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Present Perfect iyo dhibaato hadda saameyn leh: waxaad baratay subject + have/has + past participle; have/has not + past participle + yet, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Codsashada xal waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Requesting a Solution.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: solution request • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Could you solve this problem?” while requesting a practical solution politely, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you solve this problem?” iyadoo dhibaatadan ma xallin kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: solution request. Tone: polite. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Requesting a Solution: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Codsashada xal
grammar.explanationSomali: Briefly state the problem, request one clear solution, and use can, could, or would like for politeness. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Briefly state the problem, request one clear solution, and use can, could, or would like for politeness.
grammar.sentenceStructure: problem + Could you + solution?; I would like + solution

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could you solve this problem?” while requesting a practical solution politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you solve this problem?” iyadoo dhibaatadan ma xallin kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Could you check this for me?” while requesting a practical solution politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you check this for me?” iyadoo tan ma ii hubin kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: I would like a replacement because this fictional charger stopped working after two days.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan jeclaan lahaa beddel, sababtoo ah charger-kan tusaalaha ahi laba maalmood kadib ayuu shaqada joojiyay.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “I would like to change the date.” while requesting a practical solution politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I would like to change the date.” iyadoo waxaan jeclaan lahaa inaan taariikhda beddelo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could you send the correct item?” while requesting a practical solution politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you send the correct item?” iyadoo alaabta saxda ah ma diri kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Can you repair it?” while requesting a practical solution politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Can you repair it?” iyadoo ma dayactiri kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could you cancel the booking?” while requesting a practical solution politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you cancel the booking?” iyadoo ballansashada ma baajin kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “I would like a refund.” while requesting a practical solution politely, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I would like a refund.” iyadoo waxaan jeclaan lahaa lacag-celin muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

practiceQuestions.question: requesting a practical solution politely: choose the best Requesting a Solution answer (1).
options: Could you solve this problem?
An unrelated response.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan requesting a practical solution politely. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan requesting a practical solution politely. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Codsashada xal: waxaad baratay problem + Could you + solution?; I would like + solution, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Soo-jeedinta xalalka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Offering Solutions.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Offering Solutions: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Soo-jeedinta xalalka
grammar.explanationSomali: Use can, could, will, and may to offer an option or explain the next step without making a real guarantee. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Use can, could, will, and may to offer an option or explain the next step without making a real guarantee.
grammar.sentenceStructure: We can + solution; I will + next step; may need to + requirement

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “We can replace it.” while offering safe solutions in a mock service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “We can replace it.” iyadoo waan beddeli karnaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “I can check that for you.” while offering safe solutions in a mock service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I can check that for you.” iyadoo waan kuu hubin karaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “We can offer another appointment.” while offering safe solutions in a mock service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “We can offer another appointment.” iyadoo ballan kale ayaan bixin karnaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “You can return the item.” while offering safe solutions in a mock service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “You can return the item.” iyadoo alaabta waad soo celin kartaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “I will send the correct information.” while offering safe solutions in a mock service, and the response matched the situation.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “We could change the booking.” while offering safe solutions in a mock service, and the response matched the situation.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “The technician can visit tomorrow.” while offering safe solutions in a mock service, and the response matched the situation.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan offering safe solutions in a mock service. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan offering safe solutions in a mock service. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Soo-jeedinta xalalka: waxaad baratay We can + solution; I will + next step; may need to + requirement, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Aqbalaadda ama diidmada xal waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Accepting or Rejecting a Solution.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Reasonable option” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Reasonable option”, oo macnihiisu yahay “ikhtiyaar macquul ah”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: evaluation. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Accepting or Rejecting a Solution: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Aqbalaadda ama diidmada xal
grammar.explanationSomali: Accept a workable option clearly or reject it politely and ask for a specific alternative. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Accept a workable option clearly or reject it politely and ask for a specific alternative.
grammar.sentenceStructure: acceptance; or polite reason + alternative request

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “That would be fine.” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “That would be fine.” iyadoo taasi way fiicnaan lahayd muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “That works for me.” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “That works for me.” iyadoo taasi way ii shaqaynaysaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “That sounds reasonable.” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “That sounds reasonable.” iyadoo taasi waa macquul muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “I am happy with that solution.” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I am happy with that solution.” iyadoo xalkaas waan ku qanacsanahay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “The replacement would help.” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “The replacement would help.” iyadoo beddelku wuu caawin lahaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “That option will not work for me.” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “That option will not work for me.” iyadoo ikhtiyaarkaas iima shaqaynayo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Is there another solution?” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Is there another solution?” iyadoo xal kale ma jiraa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Could we try a different date?” while responding to a proposed mock solution, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could we try a different date?” iyadoo taariikh kale ma tijaabin karnaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

dialogues.titleSomali: Practice dialogue 1: responding to a proposed mock solution • communication function • Tone: neutral • comprehension • best response • role-play

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: That would be fine.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: That would be fine.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: That sounds reasonable.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: That sounds reasonable.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: The replacement would help.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: The replacement would help.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Is there another solution?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Is there another solution?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: Thank you. We have confirmed the next step.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Tallaabada xigta waan xaqiijinnay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan responding to a proposed mock solution. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan responding to a proposed mock solution. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Aqbalaadda ama diidmada xal: waxaad baratay acceptance; or polite reason + alternative request, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Gudbinta cabasho edeb leh waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Making a Complaint Politely.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.englishWord: I am writing to report a problem with...
vocabulary.somaliMeaning: waxaan qorayaa inaan soo sheego dhibaato...
vocabulary.partOfSpeech: complaint opening • everyday problem solving • formal
vocabulary.pronunciation: i am writing to report a problem with
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “I am writing to report a problem with” while making a polite complaint about a fictional service, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “I am writing to report a problem with” iyadoo waxaan qorayaa inaan soo sheego dhibaato... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: complaint opening. Tone: formal. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: There is a problem with the date on my fictional booking.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Dhibaato ayaa ka jirta taariikhda ballansashadayda tusaalaha ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: complaint. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.somaliMeaning: nasiib darro isagoo dhaawacan ayuu yimid
vocabulary.partOfSpeech: problem detail • everyday problem solving • formal
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Unfortunately, it arrived damaged.” while making a polite complaint about a fictional service, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Unfortunately, it arrived damaged.” iyadoo nasiib darro isagoo dhaawacan ayuu yimid muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: problem detail. Tone: formal. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I expected a medium shirt, but the fictional package contained a small one.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waxaan filayay shaati dhexdhexaad ah, laakiin baakadka tusaalaha ahi wuxuu watay mid yar.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: contrast. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: This has caused a delay in our fictional course registration.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Tani waxay dib-u-dhac ku keentay diiwaangelinta koorsada tusaalaha ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: effect. Tone: formal. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.englishWord: I would appreciate it if you could...
vocabulary.somaliMeaning: waan uga mahadcelin lahaa haddii aad...
vocabulary.partOfSpeech: solution request • everyday problem solving • formal
vocabulary.pronunciation: i would appreciate it if you could
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I would appreciate it if you could send the correct mock item.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waan uga mahadcelin lahaa haddii aad soo diri karto alaabta tusaalaha ah ee saxda ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: solution request. Tone: formal. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.englishWord: Please explain how this can be resolved.
vocabulary.somaliMeaning: fadlan sharax sida tan loo xallin karo
vocabulary.partOfSpeech: closing request • everyday problem solving • formal
vocabulary.pronunciation: please explain how this can be resolved.
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Please explain how this can be resolved.” while making a polite complaint about a fictional service, and the response matched the situation.

grammar.titleEnglish: Making a Complaint Politely: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Gudbinta cabasho edeb leh
grammar.explanationSomali: A complaint includes greeting, problem, relevant detail, effect, requested solution, and a polite closing. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: A complaint includes greeting, problem, relevant detail, effect, requested solution, and a polite closing.
grammar.sentenceStructure: greeting + problem + detail/effect + requested solution + closing

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “I am writing to report a problem with” while making a polite complaint about a fictional service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I am writing to report a problem with” iyadoo waxaan qorayaa inaan soo sheego dhibaato... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: There is a problem with the date on my fictional booking.
positiveExamples.somali: Dhibaato ayaa ka jirta taariikhda ballansashadayda tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Unfortunately, it arrived damaged.” while making a polite complaint about a fictional service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Unfortunately, it arrived damaged.” iyadoo nasiib darro isagoo dhaawacan ayuu yimid muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: I expected a medium shirt, but the fictional package contained a small one.
positiveExamples.somali: Waxaan filayay shaati dhexdhexaad ah, laakiin baakadka tusaalaha ahi wuxuu watay mid yar.

positiveExamples.english: This has caused a delay in our fictional course registration.
positiveExamples.somali: Tani waxay dib-u-dhac ku keentay diiwaangelinta koorsada tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: I would appreciate it if you could send the correct mock item.
positiveExamples.somali: Waan uga mahadcelin lahaa haddii aad soo diri karto alaabta tusaalaha ah ee saxda ah.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Please explain how this can be resolved.” while making a polite complaint about a fictional service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Please explain how this can be resolved.” iyadoo fadlan sharax sida tan loo xallin karo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Complaint” while making a polite complaint about a fictional service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Complaint”, oo macnihiisu yahay “cabasho”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

dialogues.titleSomali: Practice dialogue 1: making a polite complaint about a fictional service • communication function • Tone: neutral • comprehension • best response • role-play

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: I am writing to report a problem with
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: I am writing to report a problem with

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Unfortunately, it arrived damaged.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Unfortunately, it arrived damaged.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: This has caused a delay in our fictional course registration.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: This has caused a delay in our fictional course registration.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Please explain how this can be resolved.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Please explain how this can be resolved.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: Thank you. We have confirmed the next step.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Tallaabada xigta waan xaqiijinnay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan making a polite complaint about a fictional service. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan making a polite complaint about a fictional service. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Gudbinta cabasho edeb leh: waxaad baratay greeting + problem + detail/effect + requested solution + closing, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ka jawaabidda cabasho waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Responding to a Complaint.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Responding to a Complaint: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Ka jawaabidda cabasho
grammar.explanationSomali: A useful response acknowledges the problem, apologizes, checks details, offers an option, and confirms the next step. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: A useful response acknowledges the problem, apologizes, checks details, offers an option, and confirms the next step.
grammar.sentenceStructure: acknowledge + apologize + check + offer + confirm

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “I am sorry to hear that.” while responding to a fictional customer complaint, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I am sorry to hear that.” iyadoo waan ka xumahay inaan taas maqlo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “I apologize for the inconvenience.” while responding to a fictional customer complaint, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I apologize for the inconvenience.” iyadoo waan ka raalli-gelinayaa dhibka kugu dhacay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Thank you for letting us know.” while responding to a fictional customer complaint, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Thank you for letting us know.” iyadoo waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad noo sheegtay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Let me check the details.” while responding to a fictional customer complaint, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Let me check the details.” iyadoo aan faahfaahinta hubiyo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “I understand the problem.” while responding to a fictional customer complaint, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I understand the problem.” iyadoo dhibaatada waan fahmay muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “We will try to resolve this.” while responding to a fictional customer complaint, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “We will try to resolve this.” iyadoo waxaan isku dayi doonnaa inaan xallino muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could you provide the order number?” while responding to a fictional customer complaint, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you provide the order number?” iyadoo lambarka dalabka ma bixin kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “We can offer another option.” while responding to a fictional customer complaint, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “We can offer another option.” iyadoo ikhtiyaar kale ayaan bixin karnaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

dialogues.titleSomali: Practice dialogue 1: responding to a fictional customer complaint • communication function • Tone: neutral • comprehension • best response • role-play

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: I am sorry to hear that.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: I am sorry to hear that.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Thank you for letting us know.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Thank you for letting us know.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: I understand the problem.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: I understand the problem.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Could you provide the order number?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Could you provide the order number?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: Thank you. We have confirmed the next step.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Tallaabada xigta waan xaqiijinnay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan responding to a fictional customer complaint. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan responding to a fictional customer complaint. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Ka jawaabidda cabasho: waxaad baratay acknowledge + apologize + check + offer + confirm, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

grammar.titleEnglish: Reporting Something Lost or Missing: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Soo-sheegidda wax lumay ama maqan
grammar.explanationSomali: Describe the item, where it was last seen, and any safe identifying feature. Do not use real personal data. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Describe the item, where it was last seen, and any safe identifying feature. Do not use real personal data.
grammar.sentenceStructure: lost/missing item + description + last seen + next step

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Could you describe the item?”. Function: Reporting Something Lost or Missing. Context-ku wuxuu bixiyaa hal jawaab oo ugu habboon. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg Reporting Something Lost or Missing.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan reporting a fictional lost item. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan reporting a fictional lost item. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Soo-sheegidda wax lumay ama maqan: waxaad baratay lost/missing item + description + last seen + next step, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Soo-sheegidda dib-u-dhac iyo baajin waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Reporting Delays and Cancellations.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Reporting Delays and Cancellations: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Soo-sheegidda dib-u-dhac iyo baajin
grammar.explanationSomali: Use delayed for late service, postponed or rescheduled for a new time, and cancelled when it will not happen. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Use delayed for late service, postponed or rescheduled for a new time, and cancelled when it will not happen.
grammar.sentenceStructure: service/event + has been + delayed/cancelled/rescheduled + detail

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Delayed” while reading a fictional schedule update, and the learner identified its practical meaning.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.

practiceExercises.question: reading a fictional schedule update: choose the best Reporting Delays and Cancellations answer (1).
options: Delayed
An unrelated response.
A response with the wrong tense.
A response that does not solve the stated problem.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Delayed”. Function: Reporting Delays and Cancellations. Context-ku wuxuu bixiyaa hal jawaab oo ugu habboon. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg Reporting Delays and Cancellations.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan reading a fictional schedule update. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan reading a fictional schedule update. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Soo-sheegidda dib-u-dhac iyo baajin: waxaad baratay service/event + has been + delayed/cancelled/rescheduled + detail, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Foomamka iyo xogta tixraaca waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Forms and Reference Information.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Form” while completing a fictional service form, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Form”, oo macnihiisu yahay “foom”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: document. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Forms and Reference Information: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Foomamka iyo xogta tixraaca
grammar.explanationSomali: Read labels carefully and use only mock reference data. Required fields must be completed; optional fields may be left empty. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Read labels carefully and use only mock reference data. Required fields must be completed; optional fields may be left empty.
grammar.sentenceStructure: field/section + required detail; attach + document; submit + form

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan completing a fictional service form. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan completing a fictional service form. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Foomamka iyo xogta tixraaca: waxaad baratay field/section + required detail; attach + document; submit + form, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Fahamka tilmaamaha waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Understanding Instructions.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “First” while following a safe fictional booking workflow, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “First”, oo macnihiisu yahay “marka hore”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: sequence. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Understanding Instructions: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Fahamka tilmaamaha
grammar.explanationSomali: Imperatives give instructions; sequencing words show order; must and have to show requirements; do not marks a prohibition. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Imperatives give instructions; sequencing words show order; must and have to show requirements; do not marks a prohibition.
grammar.sentenceStructure: First/Next/Then + imperative; Finally + result

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan following a safe fictional booking workflow. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan following a safe fictional booking workflow. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Fahamka tilmaamaha: waxaad baratay First/Next/Then + imperative; Finally + result, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sharaxaadda tilmaamaha si cad waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Explaining Instructions Clearly.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Start by opening the fictional confirmation message.” while explaining steps in a fictional service process, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Start by opening the fictional confirmation message.” iyadoo ku bilow... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: instruction. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Explaining Instructions Clearly: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Sharaxaadda tilmaamaha si cad
grammar.explanationSomali: Give one short step at a time, use sequence markers, and explain what to do if a mock error appears. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Give one short step at a time, use sequence markers, and explain what to do if a mock error appears.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Start by + verb-ing; next step + be; when finished + result

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan explaining steps in a fictional service process. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan explaining steps in a fictional service process. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Sharaxaadda tilmaamaha si cad: waxaad baratay Start by + verb-ing; next step + be; when finished + result, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Marka wax khaldaan waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka If Something Goes Wrong.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.
