vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: If Something Goes Wrong: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Marka wax khaldaan
grammar.explanationSomali: The first conditional uses Present Simple after if and will, can, or an imperative for the likely result. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: The first conditional uses Present Simple after if and will, can, or an imperative for the likely result.
grammar.sentenceStructure: If + Present Simple, subject + will/can + base verb; If + Present Simple, imperative

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “If the link does not work” while explaining a safe response to a possible problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “If the link does not work” iyadoo haddii link-ga tusaalaha ahi shaqayn waayo... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Send us a message.” while explaining a safe response to a possible problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Send us a message.” iyadoo fariin noo soo dir muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “If the item arrives damaged” while explaining a safe response to a possible problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “If the item arrives damaged” iyadoo haddii alaabtu dhaawacan timaaddo... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Contact customer service.” while explaining a safe response to a possible problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Contact customer service.” iyadoo la xiriir adeegga macaamiisha muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “If you miss the appointment” while explaining a safe response to a possible problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “If you miss the appointment” iyadoo haddii aad ballanta seegto... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Book another one.” while explaining a safe response to a possible problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Book another one.” iyadoo mid kale qabso muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “If the time changes” while explaining a safe response to a possible problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “If the time changes” iyadoo haddii waqtigu isbeddelo... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “We will send an update.” while explaining a safe response to a possible problem, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “We will send an update.” iyadoo cusbooneysiin ayaan diri doonnaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan explaining a safe response to a possible problem. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan explaining a safe response to a possible problem. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Marka wax khaldaan: waxaad baratay If + Present Simple, subject + will/can + base verb; If + Present Simple, imperative, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Sababta iyo natiijada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Cause and Result.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Cause and Result: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Sababta iyo natiijada
grammar.explanationSomali: Because is followed by a clause; because of is followed by a noun phrase. So and as a result introduce a result. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Because is followed by a clause; because of is followed by a noun phrase. So and as a result introduce a result.
grammar.sentenceStructure: result + because + clause; result + because of + noun; cause, so + result

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Because” while explaining why a mock problem happened, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Because”, oo macnihiisu yahay “sababtoo ah”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Because of” while explaining why a mock problem happened, and the learner identified its practical meaning.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “That is why” while explaining why a mock problem happened, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “That is why”, oo macnihiisu yahay “taasi waa sababta”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “As a result” while explaining why a mock problem happened, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “As a result”, oo macnihiisu yahay “natiijada awgeed”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Incomplete address” while explaining why a mock problem happened, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Incomplete address” iyadoo cinwaan aan dhammaystirnayn muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Heavy rain” while explaining why a mock problem happened, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Heavy rain” iyadoo roob xooggan muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Wrong date” while explaining why a mock problem happened, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Wrong date”, oo macnihiisu yahay “taariikh khaldan”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan explaining why a mock problem happened. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan explaining why a mock problem happened. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Sababta iyo natiijada: waxaad baratay result + because + clause; result + because of + noun; cause, so + result, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Although iyo However waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Although and However.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: contrast connector • everyday problem solving • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Although” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Although” iyadoo inkastoo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Although and However: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Although iyo However
grammar.explanationSomali: Although introduces a contrast clause. However often begins a new sentence and is followed by a comma. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Although introduces a contrast clause. However often begins a new sentence and is followed by a comma.
grammar.sentenceStructure: Although + clause, clause; Sentence. However, sentence.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Although” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Although” iyadoo inkastoo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “However” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “However” iyadoo hase yeeshee muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Inexpensive” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Inexpensive” iyadoo qiimo jaban muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Worked well” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Worked well”, oo macnihiisu yahay “si fiican u shaqeeyay”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Booked early” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Booked early”, oo macnihiisu yahay “hore u ballansaday”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “No morning appointments” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “No morning appointments”, oo macnihiisu yahay “ballamo subax ma jirin”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Comfortable” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Comfortable”, oo macnihiisu yahay “raaxo leh”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Noisy” while contrasting two facts about a mock service, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Noisy”, oo macnihiisu yahay “buuq badan”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

options: Although

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan contrasting two facts about a mock service. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan contrasting two facts about a mock service. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Although iyo However: waxaad baratay Although + clause, clause; Sentence. However, sentence., vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Wada sheekeysiga adeegga telefoonka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Telephone Customer-Service Conversations.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: phone opening • everyday problem solving • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “How can I help you?” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “How can I help you?” iyadoo sideen kuu caawin karaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: phone opening. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: call reason • everyday problem solving • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Hassan said, “I am calling about a delayed fictional order.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “I am calling about a delayed fictional order.” iyadoo waxaan ka soo wacayaa... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: call reason. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.englishWord: Could I have your reference number?
vocabulary.partOfSpeech: reference request • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.pronunciation: could i have your reference number?
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Could I have your reference number?” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could I have your reference number?” iyadoo lambarka tixraaca ma heli karaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: reference request. Tone: polite. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.englishWord: Let me check that for you.
vocabulary.pronunciation: let me check that for you.
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Hassan said, “Let me check that for you.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Let me check that for you.” iyadoo aan kuu hubiyo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: checking. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: phone instruction • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Please hold for a moment.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Please hold for a moment.” iyadoo fadlan xoogaa khadka ku sug muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: phone instruction. Tone: polite. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: phone response • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Hassan said, “Thank you for waiting.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Thank you for waiting.” iyadoo waad ku mahadsan tahay sugitaanka muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: phone response. Tone: polite. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: negative information • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: I am afraid the morning appointment is unavailable, but we have one at three o’clock.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Waan ka xumahay, ballantii subaxda lama heli karo, laakiin waxaan haynaa mid saddexda ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Telephone Customer-Service Conversations: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Wada sheekeysiga adeegga telefoonka
grammar.explanationSomali: A service call has an opening, reason, reference check, problem or options, confirmation, and polite closing. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: A service call has an opening, reason, reference check, problem or options, confirmation, and polite closing.
grammar.sentenceStructure: opening + reason/reference + check + options + confirmation + closing

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “How can I help you?” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “How can I help you?” iyadoo sideen kuu caawin karaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “I am calling about a delayed fictional order.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I am calling about a delayed fictional order.” iyadoo waxaan ka soo wacayaa... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could I have your reference number?” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could I have your reference number?” iyadoo lambarka tixraaca ma heli karaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Let me check that for you.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Let me check that for you.” iyadoo aan kuu hubiyo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Please hold for a moment.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Please hold for a moment.” iyadoo fadlan xoogaa khadka ku sug muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Thank you for waiting.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Thank you for waiting.” iyadoo waad ku mahadsan tahay sugitaanka muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: I am afraid the morning appointment is unavailable, but we have one at three o’clock.
positiveExamples.somali: Waan ka xumahay, ballantii subaxda lama heli karo, laakiin waxaan haynaa mid saddexda ah.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Here are the available options.” while handling a fictional customer-service call, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Here are the available options.” iyadoo kuwani waa ikhtiyaarrada jira muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan handling a fictional customer-service call. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan handling a fictional customer-service call. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Wada sheekeysiga adeegga telefoonka: waxaad baratay opening + reason/reference + check + options + confirmation + closing, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Wada sheekeysiga chat support-ka waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Chat-Support Conversations.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: chat opening • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “How can I assist you?” while using a fictional support chat, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “How can I assist you?” iyadoo sideen kuu caawin karaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: chat opening. Tone: polite. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Chat-Support Conversations: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Wada sheekeysiga chat support-ka
grammar.explanationSomali: Keep chat messages short and clear, ask one question at a time, use mock references, and close politely. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Keep chat messages short and clear, ask one question at a time, use mock references, and close politely.
grammar.sentenceStructure: greeting + one question/detail + next step + closing

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “How can I assist you?” while using a fictional support chat, and the response matched the situation.

positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you send a screenshot?” iyadoo sawir shaashad tusaale ah ma diri kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Let me review the details.” iyadoo aan faahfaahinta dib u eego muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Thank you for the information.” iyadoo waad ku mahadsan tahay macluumaadka muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: How can I assist you?

lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Could you send a screenshot?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Could you send a screenshot?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Thank you for the information.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Thank you for the information.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Has that solved the problem?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Has that solved the problem?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Tallaabada xigta waan xaqiijinnay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan using a fictional support chat. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan using a fictional support chat. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Wada sheekeysiga chat support-ka: waxaad baratay greeting + one question/detail + next step + closing, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Wada sheekeysiga adeegga fool-ka-foolka ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Face-to-Face Service Conversations.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.englishWord: Excuse me, could you help me?
vocabulary.somaliMeaning: iga raalli noqo, ma i caawin kartaa?
vocabulary.partOfSpeech: service opening • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.pronunciation: excuse me, could you help me?
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “Excuse me, could you help me?” while speaking at a fictional service desk, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “Excuse me, could you help me?” iyadoo iga raalli noqo, ma i caawin kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: service opening. Tone: polite. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Hassan said, “I am here to collect a repaired mock item.” while speaking at a fictional service desk, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “I am here to collect a repaired mock item.” iyadoo waxaan halkan u imid inaan... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: purpose. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: information request • everyday problem solving • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “I have a question about the new course date.” while speaking at a fictional service desk, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “I have a question about the new course date.” iyadoo su’aal ayaan ka qabaa... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: information request. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: problem report • everyday problem solving • neutral
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: There is a problem with the date on my fictional booking.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Dhibaato ayaa ka jirta taariikhda ballansashadayda tusaalaha ah.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: problem report. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Face-to-Face Service Conversations: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Wada sheekeysiga adeegga fool-ka-foolka ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Use an appropriate opening, wait for your turn, describe the need, clarify details, and close politely. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Use an appropriate opening, wait for your turn, describe the need, clarify details, and close politely.
grammar.sentenceStructure: excuse me + purpose/problem + request/options + thanks

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Excuse me, could you help me?” while speaking at a fictional service desk, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Excuse me, could you help me?” iyadoo iga raalli noqo, ma i caawin kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: There is a problem with the date on my fictional booking.
positiveExamples.somali: Dhibaato ayaa ka jirta taariikhda ballansashadayda tusaalaha ah.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could you check this?” while speaking at a fictional service desk, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you check this?” iyadoo tan ma hubin kartaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “What are my options?” while speaking at a fictional service desk, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “What are my options?” iyadoo maxay yihiin ikhtiyaarradaydu? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Thank you for your help.” while speaking at a fictional service desk, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Thank you for your help.” iyadoo waad ku mahadsan tahay caawimada muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Information desk” while speaking at a fictional service desk, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Information desk” iyadoo miiska macluumaadka muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dabagalka arrin hore waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Following Up.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Following Up: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Dabagalka arrin hore
grammar.explanationSomali: Mention the previous contact, reference or topic, current status, update request, and polite closing. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Mention the previous contact, reference or topic, current status, update request, and polite closing.
grammar.sentenceStructure: previous contact + current status + Could you update...? + thanks

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “I am following up on Tuesday’s replacement request.” while following up on a fictional earlier request, and the response matched the situation.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan following up on a fictional earlier request. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan following up on a fictional earlier request. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Dabagalka arrin hore: waxaad baratay previous contact + current status + Could you update...? + thanks, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Xallinta isfaham-darrada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Resolving a Misunderstanding.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: problem statement • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “There has been a misunderstanding.” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: problem statement. Tone: polite. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Resolving a Misunderstanding: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Xallinta isfaham-darrada
grammar.explanationSomali: Acknowledge the misunderstanding, explain again, compare the information, clarify the detail, and thank the other person. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Acknowledge the misunderstanding, explain again, compare the information, clarify the detail, and thank the other person.
grammar.sentenceStructure: acknowledge + clarify + compare details + confirm

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “There has been a misunderstanding.” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “There has been a misunderstanding.” iyadoo isfaham-darro ayaa dhacday muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “I may not have explained it clearly.” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I may not have explained it clearly.” iyadoo waxaa laga yaabaa inaanan si cad u sharxin muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “That is not what I meant.” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “That is not what I meant.” iyadoo taasi ma ahayn waxaan ula jeeday muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Let me explain again.” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Let me explain again.” iyadoo aan mar kale sharaxo muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “I understood that the meeting started at three.” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I understood that the meeting started at three.” iyadoo waxaan fahmay in... muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Did you mean Thursday instead of Tuesday?” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Did you mean Thursday instead of Tuesday?” iyadoo ma waxaad ula jeedday...? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “We have different information.” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “We have different information.” iyadoo macluumaad kala duwan ayaan haynaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Let us check the details together.” while resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Let us check the details together.” iyadoo aan faahfaahinta wada hubinno muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan resolving a fictional misunderstanding calmly. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Xallinta isfaham-darrada: waxaad baratay acknowledge + clarify + compare details + confirm, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.titleSomali: Helidda xal labada dhinac ku habboon
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Helidda xal labada dhinac ku habboon waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Finding a Fair Solution.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.englishWord: What solution would work for you?
vocabulary.partOfSpeech: negotiation question • everyday problem solving • polite
vocabulary.pronunciation: what solution would work for you?
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: Amina said, “What solution would work for you?” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Aamina waxay tiri “What solution would work for you?” iyadoo xalkee kuu shaqayn lahaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: negotiation question. Tone: polite. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Finding a Fair Solution: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Helidda xal labada dhinac ku habboon
grammar.explanationSomali: State the options, ask about preference, make a simple compromise, and confirm the agreed next step. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: State the options, ask about preference, make a simple compromise, and confirm the agreed next step.
grammar.sentenceStructure: option A/B + preference + compromise + agreement + confirmation

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “What solution would work for you?” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “What solution would work for you?” iyadoo xalkee kuu shaqayn lahaa? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Here are two options.” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Here are two options.” iyadoo halkan waxaa jira laba ikhtiyaar muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could we agree on another collection date?” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could we agree on another collection date?” iyadoo ma ku heshiin karnaa...? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “That seems fair.” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “That seems fair.” iyadoo taasi waa caddaalad muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “I can accept that.” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “I can accept that.” iyadoo taas waan aqbali karaa muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Would another date be suitable?” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Would another date be suitable?” iyadoo taariikh kale ma ku habboonaan lahayd? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Amina said, “Could you offer a replacement instead?” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you offer a replacement instead?” iyadoo beddel ma bixin kartaa halkii? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

positiveExamples.english: Hassan said, “Let us confirm the next step.” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
positiveExamples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Let us confirm the next step.” iyadoo aan xaqiijino tallaabada xigta muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

examples.english: Amina said, “Could you offer a replacement instead?” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.
examples.somali: Aamina waxay tiri “Could you offer a replacement instead?” iyadoo beddel ma bixin kartaa halkii? muujinaysa, jawaabtuna xaaladda ayay ku habboonayd.

examples.english: Hassan said, “Let us confirm the next step.” while choosing between two fair mock options, and the response matched the situation.

dialogues.titleSomali: Practice dialogue 1: choosing between two fair mock options • communication function • Tone: neutral • comprehension • best response • role-play

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: What solution would work for you?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: What solution would work for you?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Could we agree on another collection date?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Could we agree on another collection date?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: I can accept that.
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: I can accept that.

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: I understand. Let me check the mock details and explain the options.
lines.somali: Waan fahmay. Aan hubiyo faahfaahinta tusaalaha ah oo aan sharaxo ikhtiyaarrada.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.english: Could you offer a replacement instead?
lines.somali: Macmiilku wuxuu yiri: Could you offer a replacement instead?

lines.speaker: Provider
lines.english: Thank you. We have confirmed the next step.
lines.somali: Mahadsanid. Tallaabada xigta waan xaqiijinnay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan choosing between two fair mock options. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan choosing between two fair mock options. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Helidda xal labada dhinac ku habboon: waxaad baratay option A/B + preference + compromise + agreement + confirmation, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Ogeysiisyada iyo cusbooneysiinta maalinlaha ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Everyday Notices and Updates.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Service unavailable” while reading a fictional everyday notice, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Service unavailable”, oo macnihiisu yahay “adeegga lama heli karo”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: notice. Tone: formal. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Everyday Notices and Updates: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Ogeysiisyada iyo cusbooneysiinta maalinlaha ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Identify the notice type, changed information, required action, and time or place affected. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Identify the notice type, changed information, required action, and time or place affected.
grammar.sentenceStructure: notice status + detail + required action

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan reading a fictional everyday notice. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan reading a fictional everyday notice. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Ogeysiisyada iyo cusbooneysiinta maalinlaha ah: waxaad baratay notice status + detail + required action, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Fahamka xaqiijimaha iyo rasiidyada waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Understanding Confirmations and Receipts.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Booking confirmation” while checking fictional confirmation and receipt details, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Booking confirmation”, oo macnihiisu yahay “xaqiijinta ballansashada”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: document. Tone: formal. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Understanding Confirmations and Receipts: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Fahamka xaqiijimaha iyo rasiidyada
grammar.explanationSomali: Check the reference, date, time, item or service, status, amount, next step, and mock contact method. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Check the reference, date, time, item or service, status, amount, next step, and mock contact method.
grammar.sentenceStructure: document type + reference + status/details + next step

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Booking confirmation” while checking fictional confirmation and receipt details, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Booking confirmation”, oo macnihiisu yahay “xaqiijinta ballansashada”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

positiveExamples.english: The mock scenario used “Reference” while checking fictional confirmation and receipt details, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
positiveExamples.somali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Reference”, oo macnihiisu yahay “tixraac”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

practiceQuestions.question: checking fictional confirmation and receipt details: choose the best Understanding Confirmations and Receipts answer (1).
options: Booking confirmation
An unrelated response.
A response with the wrong tense.
A response that does not solve the stated problem.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista codsi macluumaad waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Writing an Information Request.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Writing an Information Request: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Qorista codsi macluumaad
grammar.explanationSomali: Write a clear subject or greeting, reason, focused questions, relevant mock detail, and polite closing. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Write a clear subject or greeting, reason, focused questions, relevant mock detail, and polite closing.
grammar.sentenceStructure: greeting + reason + two/three clear questions + thanks

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan writing for fictional course or service information. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan writing for fictional course or service information. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Qorista codsi macluumaad: waxaad baratay greeting + reason + two/three clear questions + thanks, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista cabasho edeb leh waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Writing a Complaint.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Writing a Complaint: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Qorista cabasho edeb leh
grammar.explanationSomali: A written complaint identifies the service, date, problem, expectation, effect, requested solution, and polite ending. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: A written complaint identifies the service, date, problem, expectation, effect, requested solution, and polite ending.
grammar.sentenceStructure: greeting + service/date + problem + expected result + requested solution + closing

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

dialogues.titleSomali: Model complaint • 154 words • mock data

lines.speaker: Writer
lines.english:
Hello Service Team,

I am writing to report a problem with a fictional order that arrived yesterday. The confirmation shows one medium blue shirt at thirty dollars, but the package contained a small black shirt. I checked the mock reference U12-318, and the item description does not match the confirmation. I needed the correct shirt for a course presentation this Friday, so this mistake has caused a delay.

I would like to exchange the item for the medium blue shirt shown on the confirmation. Could you please explain the return steps and confirm whether the correct item is available? I have kept the fictional receipt and can attach a copy to the mock return form. If the correct shirt is unavailable, I would prefer a refund.

Please let me know which option is possible and when I should return the incorrect item. Thank you for checking this problem.

Kind regards,
Amina
lines.somali: Qoraalku wuxuu si edeb leh u sheegayaa dalab tusaale ah, khaladka, saameynta, beddelka ama lacag-celinta la codsaday iyo tallaabada xigta.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan writing a 130-to-190-word fictional complaint. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan writing a 130-to-190-word fictional complaint. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Qorista cabasho edeb leh: waxaad baratay greeting + service/date + problem + expected result + requested solution + closing, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Qorista fariin dabagal ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Writing a Follow-Up Message.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.partOfSpeech: message type • everyday problem solving • formal
vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Follow-up” while writing a fictional follow-up after earlier contact, and the learner identified its practical meaning.

vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: message type. Tone: formal. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Writing a Follow-Up Message: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Qorista fariin dabagal ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Refer to the previous message, include a mock reference, state the current status, ask for an update, and close politely. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Refer to the previous message, include a mock reference, state the current status, ask for an update, and close politely.
grammar.sentenceStructure: previous contact/reference + no update yet + polite update question + closing

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan writing a fictional follow-up after earlier contact. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan writing a fictional follow-up after earlier contact. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Qorista fariin dabagal ah: waxaad baratay previous contact/reference + no update yet + polite update question + closing, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Xaalado nolol-maalmeed isku dhafan waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Integrated Real-Life Scenarios.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Wrong product received” while solving an integrated fictional daily-service scenario, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Wrong product received”, oo macnihiisu yahay “alaab khaldan oo la helay”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: scenario. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Integrated Real-Life Scenarios: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Xaalado nolol-maalmeed isku dhafan
grammar.explanationSomali: Identify the problem and document, confirm key information, compare options, speak politely, and write the agreed next step. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Identify the problem and document, confirm key information, compare options, speak politely, and write the agreed next step.
grammar.sentenceStructure: background + evidence + problem + confirmation + options + solution

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.titleEnglish: Extended Reading — Solving a Service Problem
lessons.titleSomali: Akhris dheer oo ku saabsan xallinta dhibaato adeeg
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Akhris dheer oo ku saabsan xallinta dhibaato adeeg waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Extended Reading — Solving a Service Problem.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

dialogues.titleSomali: Extended A2 reading • 271 words • service problem

lines.speaker: Reader
lines.english:
Amina used a fictional delivery service to order study materials for an evening course. The confirmation said that two books would arrive on Tuesday. On Tuesday afternoon, the service sent a message saying that the package had been delivered, but Amina had not received it.

First, she contacted chat support and gave the mock reference U12-204. The agent checked the record and said that one book had been delivered on Monday. Amina explained that the order contained two books and that the expected date was Tuesday. There was a misunderstanding because the agent was reading an older test order with a similar reference.

Amina politely asked the agent to confirm the full reference, item quantity, and delivery address. The agent repeated U12-204 and then noticed that the correct record showed a delay. The package was still at the fictional local service centre because the address line was incomplete.

The agent apologized for the confusing confirmation and offered two solutions. The service could deliver the books on Thursday after the address was corrected, or Amina could collect them on Wednesday afternoon. Amina needed the books for class on Thursday morning, so the later delivery would not work. She chose collection and asked for a written confirmation.

The agent updated the address, sent a mock collection notice, and confirmed that no extra payment was required. On Wednesday, Amina checked the reference at the service desk and collected both books. She thanked the staff and later sent a short message confirming that the problem had been resolved. The situation ended well because she described the current problem clearly, checked the details, and chose a practical solution.
lines.somali: Aamina waxay adeeg tusaale ah kala xiriirtay laba buug oo dib u dhacay. Waxay caddaysay tixraaca, tirada iyo cinwaanka, kadibna waxay dooratay inay xarunta ka qaadato. Dhibaatadu waxay ku dhammaatay xal la xaqiijiyay.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan reading how a fictional service problem was solved. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan reading how a fictional service problem was solved. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Akhris dheer oo ku saabsan xallinta dhibaato adeeg: waxaad baratay main idea + sequence + communication functions + result, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Wada sheekeysiyada adeegyada maalinlaha ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Complete Everyday-Service Dialogues.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Ask for information” while following a complete fictional service conversation, and the learner identified its practical meaning.

grammar.titleEnglish: Complete Everyday-Service Dialogues: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Wada sheekeysiyada adeegyada maalinlaha ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Use the situation, document, tone, grammar, and requested outcome to choose the single best response. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Use the situation, document, tone, grammar, and requested outcome to choose the single best response.
grammar.sentenceStructure: opening + information/problem + clarification + solution + confirmation + closing

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

practiceExercises.question: following a complete fictional service conversation: choose the best Complete Everyday-Service Dialogues answer (1).
options: Ask for information
An unrelated response.
A response with the wrong tense.
A response that does not solve the stated problem.
practiceExercises.explanationSomali: Jawaabta saxda ahi waa “Ask for information”. Function: Complete Everyday-Service Dialogues. Context-ku wuxuu bixiyaa hal jawaab oo ugu habboon. Haddii aad qaladdo, dib u eeg Complete Everyday-Service Dialogues.

practiceExercises.question: following a complete fictional service conversation: choose the best Complete Everyday-Service Dialogues answer (2).
options: Confirm booking details
An unrelated response.
A response with the wrong tense.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan following a complete fictional service conversation. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan following a complete fictional service conversation. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Wada sheekeysiyada adeegyada maalinlaha ah: waxaad baratay opening + information/problem + clarification + solution + confirmation + closing, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.
