lessons.titleSomali: Grammar-ka A2 ee xaaladaha dhabta ah
lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Grammar-ka A2 ee xaaladaha dhabta ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka A2 Grammar in Real-Life Communication.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Present Simple” while choosing A2 grammar in an everyday service situation, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Present Simple”, oo macnihiisu yahay “joogto iyo xaqiiqo”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: grammar. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: A2 Grammar in Real-Life Communication: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Grammar-ka A2 ee xaaladaha dhabta ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Choose tense and structure because of meaning: routine, current action, completed event, current result, plan, possibility, obligation, comparison, or condition. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Choose tense and structure because of meaning: routine, current action, completed event, current result, plan, possibility, obligation, comparison, or condition.
grammar.sentenceStructure: meaning/context -> suitable A2 tense or structure

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan choosing A2 grammar in an everyday service situation. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan choosing A2 grammar in an everyday service situation. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Grammar-ka A2 ee xaaladaha dhabta ah: waxaad baratay meaning/context -> suitable A2 tense or structure, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Common Everyday-Communication Mistakes.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

grammar.titleEnglish: Common Everyday-Communication Mistakes: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Khaladaadka caadiga ah
grammar.explanationSomali: Use uncountable information, correct prepositions, base verbs after did, Present Perfect with yet, and statement order in indirect questions. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Use uncountable information, correct prepositions, base verbs after did, Present Perfect with yet, and statement order in indirect questions.
grammar.sentenceStructure: natural collocation + correct tense/preposition/word order

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.

lessons.speakingPractice: Samee role-play ku saabsan correcting a common everyday-service error. Aqoonso dhibaatada ama macluumaadka, xaqiiji faahfaahinta, kadibna codso ama bixi xal edeb leh.
lessons.writingPractice: Qor fariin gaaban oo ku saabsan correcting a common everyday-service error. Ku dar greeting, relevant mock detail, request ama solution, confirmation iyo polite closing.
lessons.summarySomali: Khaladaadka caadiga ah: waxaad baratay natural collocation + correct tense/preposition/word order, vocabulary, tone iyo tallaabooyinka problem-solving-ka.

lessons.shortDescriptionSomali: Dib-u-eegista Unit 12 waxaa lagu baranayaa Af-Soomaali cad iyadoo la adeegsanayo adeegyo, documents iyo xaalado mala-awaal ah.
learningObjectives: Faham vocabulary-ga iyo communication function-ka Unit Review.
Dooro grammar iyo tone ku habboon context-ka.
Aqoonso problem, information, request, response iyo solution.
Samee speaking iyo writing adigoon isticmaalin xog dhab ah.

vocabulary.exampleEnglish: The mock scenario used “Service review” while reviewing all Unit 12 service and problem-solving skills, and the learner identified its practical meaning.
vocabulary.exampleSomali: Xaaladda tusaalaha ahi waxay adeegsatay “Service review”, oo macnihiisu yahay “dib-u-eegis adeeg”, ardayguna wuxuu aqoonsaday isticmaalkeeda.
vocabulary.explanationSomali: Function: review. Tone: neutral. Example-ku wuxuu muujinayaa collocation ama response ku habboon xaalad maalinle ah.
vocabulary.commonMistakeSomali: Ha isku khaldin erayada isku dhow; eeg tense-ka, preposition-ka, document-ka iyo xalka context-ku dalbanayo.

grammar.titleEnglish: Unit Review: real-life language pattern
grammar.titleSomali: Qaabka hadalka: Dib-u-eegista Unit 12
grammar.explanationSomali: Review service vocabulary, information, confirmation, problems, solutions, complaints, documents, support channels, integrated grammar, and corrections. Qaabka waxaa lagu dooranayaa macnaha iyo xaaladda, mana gudbayo heerka A2.
grammar.rule: Review service vocabulary, information, confirmation, problems, solutions, complaints, documents, support channels, integrated grammar, and corrections.
grammar.sentenceStructure: context + problem/information + polite action + confirmed solution

negativeExamples.english: The customer did not share real account or contact details in the mock scenario.
negativeExamples.somali: Macmiilku xog akoon ama xiriir dhab ah kuma bixin xaaladda tusaalaha ah.

negativeExamples.english: The provider did not promise a real service result.
negativeExamples.somali: Adeeg-bixiyuhu ma samayn ballan adeeg oo dhab ah.

questionExamples.english: Could you explain which option solves the stated problem?
questionExamples.somali: Ma sharxi kartaa ikhtiyaarka xallinaya dhibaatada la sheegay?

questionExamples.english: Has the customer confirmed the reference and next step yet?
questionExamples.somali: Macmiilku ma xaqiijiyay tixraaca iyo tallaabada xigta?

commonMistakesSomali: Information iyo advice waa uncountable; ha isticmaalin an information ama an advice.
Ka dib did isticmaal base verb; Present Perfect-na u adeegso natiijo hadda jirta.
Indirect question-ka ku hay statement order: where the office is.
Kala saar repair, replace, exchange iyo refund; delay, postpone, reschedule iyo cancel.
